prompt:
Scene:
A square retail-ready campaign visual for Chibi Franchise Campaign Pack, combining cute character appeal with polished commercial presentation. The composition should feel like a high-finish launch board: crisp packaging edges, collectible object staging, clean shelf or poster context, and vivid but controlled color. It should be immediately legible from far away, but still dense with charming small details that reward closer inspection.

Subject:
Build the image around Sticker Burst Variant, a frame that keeps the same character and package identity while adding collectible sticker energy. Translate Convert larger fictional universes into tightly art-directed chibi campaign systems that can span posters, stickers, key visuals, and merch-ready layouts. into one lovable mascot, figure, or product system that feels ready for posters, boxes, stickers, inserts, or point-of-sale material. The result should feel like a fresh research image with clear commercial focus rather than random fan art. The main subject must remain unmistakable even when surrounded by accessories and display pieces.

Important details:
Charm alone is not enough. Preserve clean silhouette recognition, convincing package construction, reliable prop scale, and structured layout logic so the image feels sellable. This theme studies style-transfer, multi-image-reference, commercial-mockup, structured-layout through a production-ready visual system. Avoid noisy clutter; every secondary element should reinforce collectibility, retail desirability, or explainer clarity. Aim for clear hierarchy, polished craft, and immediately usable campaign logic.

Use case:
Chibi Franchise Campaign Pack series study 2/4.

Constraints:
No readable text, no watermark, no logos, preserve exact 1:1 aspect ratio, no horror elements, no brand theft, no malformed packaging edges, no muddy mascot silhouette, no messy retail shelf, no chaotic prop overload.
title: Sticker Burst Variant
description: Sticker Burst Variant for Chibi Franchise Campaign Pack, keeps the same character and package identity while adding collectible sticker energy.

generation.runner_notes: Preserve the anchor image identity while varying the requested campaign angle.
